seo.title: Live-in Care Agency in London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing provides fully vetted live-in carers across London for elderly care, complex needs, palliative support, and companionship. CQC-aligned placements.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Live-in Care Agency in London
fields.sub: Fully vetted live-in care workers supplied across Greater London for elderly support, complex needs, and companionship — matched to each household.

image.alt: HCA Agency in Islington supporting local care homes

fields.image_alt: HCA Agency in Islington supporting local care homes

fields.heading: Live-in care workers matched to the household
fields.body: When a household needs round-the-clock support at home, the right live-in worker makes all the difference. Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted live-in care workers to care providers and private households across Greater London. We take time to understand the needs of the person being supported, from daily living and mobility to companionship and specialist requirements, and match a worker whose skills and temperament fit. Because our workers are directly employed and thoroughly vetted, families and providers can feel confident about who is in the home. Whether you need cover for a fixed period, a rolling arrangement, or support while you plan longer-term care, we can supply live-in workers to suit.

image.alt: Agency care worker in London providing live-in home care

fields.image_alt: Agency care worker in London providing live-in home care

items.title: Tailored Matching
items.body: We match each live-in worker to the household's routine, needs, and preferences, rather than sending whoever is next on a list.

items.title: Round-the-Clock Support
items.body: Live-in workers provide continuous on-hand support at home, covering daytime help and reassurance through the night.

items.title: CQC-Aligned Recruitment
items.body: Our recruitment and vetting follow a CQC-compliant process, so the workers we supply meet a consistent standard.

items.title: Local Expertise
items.body: Our workers live and work across Greater London and understand the settings and communities they support.

items.title: Versatile Arrangements
items.body: We supply live-in workers for short breaks, respite, rolling cover, or longer placements, flexing around what the household needs.

items.title: Continuity of Care
items.body: Wherever possible we keep the same worker in place, so the person being supported builds a trusted, familiar relationship.

fields.heading: How we vet every live-in care worker
fields.body: Trust matters most when someone is living in a person's home. Before we supply a live-in worker, we complete enhanced DBS checks, verify their right to work, and take up references from previous care employers. We assess relevant skills for the placement, and because our workers are directly employed we keep their training and records up to date. Our process is CQC-compliant, giving providers and families a clear, documented picture of who they are welcoming into the home.

image.alt: Agency care worker in London providing live-in home care

fields.image_alt: Agency care worker in London providing live-in home care

items.q: What does a live-in care worker do?
items.a: A live-in worker stays in the home and provides on-hand support with daily living, mobility, companionship, and other agreed needs. We match the worker to the specific requirements of the household.

items.q: Do you supply live-in workers for private households?
items.a: Yes. We supply vetted live-in care workers to both care providers and private households across Greater London.

items.q: How are your live-in workers vetted?
items.a: Every worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement, with relevant skills assessed for the role.

items.q: Can we keep the same live-in worker?
items.a: Continuity is a priority. Wherever possible we keep the same worker in place so the person being supported sees a familiar face.
We supply live-in care workers across Greater London and can discuss the specific area you need covered.

locations.label: Care home CPD and CQC compliance

fields.heading: Looking for a live-in care worker in London?
fields.sub: Tell us about the household and the support needed, and we will match a suitable vetted worker.
